package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for panic_on_error: err != nil branches that jump straight to panic or log.Fatal style exits.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: errors; severity: warning.
func scenario306Positive(path string) []byte {
	data, err := os.ReadFile(path)
	if err != nil { panic(err) }
	return data
}
